name: semwitness
description: Proof-carrying shadow evaluation for semantic compression and bounded intent compilation.

interface.shortDescription: Verify compression and bounded intent candidates in shadow mode.
interface.longDescription: SemWitness analyzes context, verifies deterministic compression, and evaluates exact, consensus, or explicitly networked intent compilers without claiming transparent prompt interception or cache authorization.
defaultPrompt: Analyze this context for safe token savings with SemWitness.
Simulate compression and verify the resulting proof bundle.
Replay this fixture and compare its measured token cost.
Evaluate this intent normalizer offline in shadow mode.
Evaluate an OpenAI-compatible intent compiler with explicit network opt-in and a request budget.
